hero.title: JOSÉ ANTONIO MORENO MARÍN
hero.subtitle: Backend developer | Full Stack Developer
hero.description: Java backend developer with previous full stack experience using Angular and Laravel. Specialized in building scalable and efficient solutions, bringing value to every phase of the software development lifecycle with exceptional problem-solving adaptability.

profile.title: Professional Profile
profile.description: Software engineer with experience designing and developing scalable RESTful APIs, microservices architectures, and containerized deployments with Docker and Kubernetes. Specialized in Java and Spring Boot for backend development, with previous experience in Angular, TypeScript, and Laravel. Proven experience building complex business logic, modeling relational databases, automated testing with JUnit and Mockito, and CI/CD pipelines with Docker and GitHub Actions. I quickly integrate into new teams, bring a different perspective thanks to my physiotherapy background, and focus on Clean Code and system performance.

responsibilities: Backend development with Java 17 in a microservices architecture, using Maven for build and dependency management.
Containerization and orchestration of services with Docker and Kubernetes in enterprise environments.
Management and optimization of relational databases with MySQL in production environments.
Design and development of scalable RESTful APIs with Laravel/PHP, defining clear data contracts and optimizing SQL queries in relational databases for high-traffic applications.
Frontend development with Angular, TypeScript, and Ionic, ensuring efficient integration between server logic and UI and optimizing HTTP request performance.
E2E view in Agile teams: holistic perspective of the software lifecycle, enabling technical communication between the data layer and modular views in cross-platform applications.

skills.title: Technical and Soft Skills
skills.subtitle: A summary of my technological, tools, and competencies I work with.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.label: My Work
projects.subtitle: Here are some projects I've worked on. Feel free to explore them.
projects.project3Description: A backend API for product management built with Java 17 and Spring Boot. Features category management, full CRUD operations and API documentation with Swagger. Uses MySQL for data persistence.
projects.project4Description: A REST API for powerbuilding and fitness coaching management. Features a rich domain model (avoiding the anemic model anti-pattern), zero-trust validations and secure authentication with JWT. Currently in development, with domain models and unit tests already implemented.

transition.title: From Physiotherapy to Code
transition.subtitle: My journey as a physiotherapist has shaped me with a unique set of soft skills that are highly valuable in the corporate software development world.
transition.card1Text: In physiotherapy, I developed diagnostic skills to identify problems, develop treatment plans, and assess progress. Similarly, I use these skills to debug code, analyze system requirements and design effective solutions.
transition.card3Text: Managed patient records, scheduled appointments, tracked progress, and handled billing. Developed strong organizational skills that translate to software project management, version control, and documentation.
transition.card5Text: Physiotherapy required staying up to date on the latest methods and certifications. In software development, I maintain this same commitment to continuous learning amidst a constantly evolving technological landscape.
